headline: Is Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Pricing Reflect Its Government Contracting Prospects And DCF Upside Potential
summary: Wondering if Leidos Holdings at around US$165.95 is offering value or stretching expectations? This breakdown focuses squarely on what the current price implies. The stock has had mixed recent returns, with a 4.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 2.7% gain over 30 days, a 9.5% decline year to date, and a 24.3% return over the past year. Returns over 3 and 5 years sit at 90.3% and 83.8% respectively. Recent headlines around Leidos Holdings have largely focused on its role in government...
